option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <BorderPane styleClass="root" stylesheets="@mainPage.css" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17.0.12" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.example.laborganiser.frontend.mainPage.MainPage">
<left> <VBox spacing="10" styleClass="sidebar" fx:id="sidebarContainer"> <children> <Button styleClass="nav-button" onAction="#onAddCollectionClick" text="AddCollection" prefWidth="200"/> <Button styleClass="nav-button" onAction="#onAddShelfClick" text="AddShelf" prefWidth="200"/> <Button styleClass="nav-button" onAction="#onAddVialClick" text="AddVial" prefWidth="200"/> <Button styleClass="nav-button" onAction="#onImageClick" text="Image test fuck" prefWidth="200"/> </children> </VBox> </left>
<center> <VBox styleClass="content" spacing="10"> <HBox> <Label text="Produse" styleClass="produseLabel" />
<Pane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<Button text="Add product" styleClass="button"/> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="10" styleClass="card">
<TextField promptText="Type here..." />
<TableView fx:id="tableView" styleClass="table-view">
<columns> <TableColumn text="Title" fx:id="titleCol" prefWidth="150"/> <TableColumn text="Status" fx:id="statusCol" prefWidth="120"/> <TableColumn text="Tip produs" fx:id="typeCol" prefWidth="180"/> <TableColumn text="Locatie" fx:id="locationCol" prefWidth="120"/> <TableColumn text="Tip substanta" fx:id="substanceCol" prefWidth="150"/> </columns>
</TableView>
<HBox> <Label text="Viewing 8 of 12 items"/>
<Pane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<Label text="Page 1 of 2"/> </HBox>
</VBox> </VBox> </center> <right> <ScrollBar orientation="VERTICAL" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER" /> </right>
</BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <BorderPane styleClass="root" stylesheets="@mainPage.css" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17.0.12" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.example.laborganiser.frontend.mainPage.MainPage">
<left> <VBox spacing="10" styleClass="sidebar" fx:id="sidebarContainer"> <children> <Button styleClass="nav-button" onAction="#onAddCollectionClick" text="AddCollection" prefWidth="200"/> <Button styleClass="nav-button" onAction="#onAddShelfClick" text="AddShelf" prefWidth="200"/> <Button styleClass="nav-button" onAction="#onAddVialClick" text="AddVial" prefWidth="200"/> <Button styleClass="nav-button" onAction="#onImageClick" text="Image test fuck" prefWidth="200"/> </children> </VBox> </left>
<center> <VBox styleClass="content" spacing="10"> <HBox> <Label text="Produse" styleClass="produseLabel" />
<Pane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<Button text="Add product" styleClass="button"/> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="10" styleClass="card">
<TextField promptText="Type here..." />
<TableView fx:id="tableView" styleClass="table-view" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
<columns> <TableColumn text="Title" fx:id="titleCol" prefWidth="150"/> <TableColumn text="Status" fx:id="statusCol" prefWidth="120"/> <TableColumn text="Tip produs" fx:id="typeCol" prefWidth="180"/> <TableColumn text="Locatie" fx:id="locationCol" prefWidth="120"/> <TableColumn text="Tip substanta" fx:id="substanceCol" prefWidth="150"/> </columns>
</TableView>
<HBox> <Label text="Viewing 8 of 12 items"/>
<Pane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<Label text="Page 1 of 2"/> </HBox>
</VBox> </VBox> </center> <right> <ScrollBar orientation="VERTICAL" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER" /> </right>
</BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
